---
title: The Metamorphosis
author: Franz Kafka
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★★ | A New Translation
rating: 4
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# The Metamorphosis
I liked it, it was easy to follow and somewhat easy to relate and understand, which is something that i think isnt very common with all these "classics" and an understandable book is a hard find

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Finished
